languages.text: "Источник ваших данных прискорбно неточен, капитан. Масштаб пенитенциарного мира Веабос-6 чересчур скромен для того, чтобы Культ Механикус тратил на него столь большое количество сил и ресурсов. Как правило, лишь миры-кузницы удостаиваются подобной чести".

traits.locale_text:
[draft]
имеет данные, что гапраки как-то связаны с Кьява Гамма, намекает правильный ответ
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

traits.locale_text: Драфт: имеет данные, что гапраки как-то связаны с Кьява Гамма, намекает правильный ответ

languages.text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."
languages.original_text: "Источник ваших данных прискорбно неточен, капитан. Масштаб пенитенциарного мира Веабос-6 чересчур скромен для того, чтобы Культ Механикус тратил на него столь большое количество сил и ресурсов. Как правило, лишь миры-кузницы удостаиваются подобной чести".

traits.locale_text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

"The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

"The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

languages.text: “上尉，你的数据来源错得离谱。维博斯六号星这个刑罚世界实在太过寒酸，根本不值得机械修会耗费如此巨大的精力与资源。通常，只有铸造世界才配享有这份殊荣。”
languages.original_text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

traits.locale_text: “上尉，你的数据来源错得离谱。维博斯六号星这个刑罚世界实在太过寒酸，根本不值得机械修会耗费如此巨大的精力与资源。通常，只有铸造世界才配享有这份殊荣。”

languages.text: "Verilerinizin kaynağı ne yazık ki son derece hatalı Yüzbaşı. Vheabos VI ceza dünyasının ölçeği, Cult Mechanicus'un bu kadar büyük bir çaba ve kaynak harcamasını haklı çıkarmak için çok mütevazı. Kural gereği yalnızca döküm dünyaları bu onura erişebilir."
languages.original_text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

traits.locale_text: "Verilerinizin kaynağı ne yazık ki son derece hatalı Yüzbaşı. Vheabos VI ceza dünyasının ölçeği, Cult Mechanicus'un bu kadar büyük bir çaba ve kaynak harcamasını haklı çıkarmak için çok mütevazı. Kural gereği yalnızca döküm dünyaları bu onura erişebilir."

languages.text: «Su fuente de datos es trágicamente imprecisa, capitán. La escala del mundo penal de Vheabos VI es demasiado modesta como para que el Culto Mechanicus derroche tantos esfuerzos y recursos. Esa clase de honor estaría reservado para un mundo forja normalmente».
languages.original_text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

traits.locale_text: «Su fuente de datos es trágicamente imprecisa, capitán. La escala del mundo penal de Vheabos VI es demasiado modesta como para que el Culto Mechanicus derroche tantos esfuerzos y recursos. Esa clase de honor estaría reservado para un mundo forja normalmente».

languages.text: « La source de vos données est terriblement inexacte, capitaine. Le monde pénal de Vhéabos-VI a une taille bien trop modeste pour justifier que le Culte Mechanicus y déploie autant d'efforts et de ressources. La règle veut que seuls les mondes forges méritent un tel honneur. »
languages.original_text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

traits.locale_text: « La source de vos données est terriblement inexacte, capitaine. Le monde pénal de Vhéabos-VI a une taille bien trop modeste pour justifier que le Culte Mechanicus y déploie autant d'efforts et de ressources. La règle veut que seuls les mondes forges méritent un tel honneur. »

languages.text: "Die Quelle Eurer Daten ist leider inakkurat, Captain. Die Bedeutung der Strafwelt Vheabos-VI ist viel zu gering, als dass der Kult Mechanicus derartige Bemühungen und Ressourcen aufwenden würde. Eine solche Ehre erfahren nur Fabrikwelten."
languages.original_text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

traits.locale_text: "Die Quelle Eurer Daten ist leider inakkurat, Captain. Die Bedeutung der Strafwelt Vheabos-VI ist viel zu gering, als dass der Kult Mechanicus derartige Bemühungen und Ressourcen aufwenden würde. Eine solche Ehre erfahren nur Fabrikwelten."

languages.text: 「君のデータの出典は極めて不正確だ、大尉。ヴェアボスVIの流刑地の規模は、カルト・メカニクスが多大な労力と資源を費やすにはあまりにも控えめです。そのような栄誉を受けるのは、原則として鍛造世界だけだ。"
languages.original_text: "The source of your data is woefully inaccurate, Captain. The scale of the penal world of Vheabos VI is much too modest to warrant the Cult Mechanicus expending such a great deal of effort and resources on it. Only forge worlds receive that honour, as a rule."

traits.locale_text: 「君のデータの出典は極めて不正確だ、大尉。ヴェアボスVIの流刑地の規模は、カルト・メカニクスが多大な労力と資源を費やすにはあまりにも控えめです。そのような栄誉を受けるのは、原則として鍛造世界だけだ。"
